import io
import string

fn hashes(_ n: Int) -> String
  mut s = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    s = "#{s}#"
    i = i + 1
  end
  s
end

fn count_digit(_ line: String, _ d: Int) -> Int
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  let target = 48 + d
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == target
        count = count + 1
      end
    when None
      count = count
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  count
end

fn print_digit(_ line: String, _ d: Int) -> Unit
  let c = count_digit(line, d)
  let bars = hashes(c)
  println("#{d}: #{bars}")
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

print_digit(line, 0)
print_digit(line, 1)
print_digit(line, 2)
print_digit(line, 3)
print_digit(line, 4)
print_digit(line, 5)
print_digit(line, 6)
print_digit(line, 7)
print_digit(line, 8)
print_digit(line, 9)
